description: Highlight film from Maya & Jordan's NoDa wedding. Ceremony, first look, and golden-hour portraits cut to a slow acoustic score. Filmed with Nina as second shooter.
name: Maya & Jordan — Wedding Film

description: Behind-the-scenes cut from a downtown Charlotte engagement shoot — lighting setup, posing, and the candid moments between frames. Shared with the clients as a keepsake.
name: Engagement Shoot — BTS Cut

description: Motion reference for the Porch Light series — warm window light and soft movement studies to lock the mood for the stills set.
name: Porch Light Series — Motion Reference

description: Travel reel shot on a week in Lisbon — tiled facades, tram lines, and the light off the Tagus at dusk. Personal work between bookings.
name: Lisbon — Travel Reel

description: Screen-recorded editing timelapse — culling and color grading a wedding gallery in Lightroom and Capture One. Sped up roughly 40x.
name: Editing Timelapse — Wedding Gallery Grade

description: Full-length wedding film for Priya & Aaron at a vineyard outside Charlotte. Ceremony, toasts, and first dance. Second-camera coverage by Nina.
name: Priya & Aaron — Wedding Film

description: Behind-the-scenes from a studio portrait session — strobe testing, tethered shooting, and client direction. Quick cut for the blog.
